tools.name: ast_grep_search
tools.description: Search code using structural AST patterns with meta-variables ($VAR, $$$). Returns matching locations and code.

tools.name: ast_grep_rewrite_preview
tools.description: Preview structural rewrites without applying them. Shows before/after for each match.

tools.name: ast_grep_rewrite_apply
tools.description: Apply structural rewrites to files on disk. Modifies files in place. Preview first with ast_grep_rewrite_preview.

tools.name: ast_grep_scan
tools.description: Run custom YAML lint rules against code. Returns diagnostics with severity, message, and location.

tools.name: ast_grep_debug_pattern
tools.description: Show the parsed AST of a pattern. Useful for debugging why a pattern does or does not match.
